text:
(In reply to Conrad Meyer from comment #5)
> Created attachment 148269 [details]
> /usr/bin/ld: undefined reference to symbol `elf32_fsize@@R1.0' (try linking

Is there a way to get the SONAME rather than a file path? I.e, "try linking -lelf"
